parsed.mechanism: Conda's geometry-aware preconditioning, which induces 2-2.5x faster convergence by routing gradient updates along better-conditioned directions, is transferred into MaTTS so that conditioned update steps accelerate the synthesis of higher-quality memory from scaled agent interactions.
parsed.transfer: The fast-convergence preconditioning mechanism from A transfers to B as the optimizer that compresses noisy scaled experiences into stable memory faster.
parsed.open_problem: Does applying Conda-style preconditioning to memory synthesis in MaTTS reduce the number of agent interactions needed to reach a target memory quality?
parsed.niche_name: Preconditioned Memory Synthesis for Faster Test-Time Scaling
parsed.primary_quote: scales up agent interactions to generate diverse experiences that provide signals for synthesizing higher-quality memory
